mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document WHERE status = 'READY'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document WHERE status IN ('PARSING', 'CHUNKING', 'EMBEDDING')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document WHERE status = 'FAILED'
SELECT DATE(created_at) AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM document WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document WHERE kb_id = #{kbId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chunk WHERE doc_id IN (SELECT id FROM document WHERE kb_id = #{kbId})
SELECT name FROM knowledge_base WHERE id = #{kbId}
